summary: Frontend e2e testing for InScale Digital scheduling app. Verified landing page (hero, marquee, services, how-it-works, testimonials, FAQ, final CTA, footer), service-deep-link booking (/booking/website-development), full booking flow (calendar -> slot -> form -> submit -> success), admin login (right/wrong creds), admin dashboard (stats, filters, search, status update), logout & route protection, slot collision (409) and responsive layouts. All required data-testids present and functional.

issues: Hero h1 wraps awkwardly on mobile: 'Jadwalkan jasa' / 'digital Anda —' / 'dalam satu klik' renders the em-dash on its own line ('Anda —' breaks). Cosmetic only — readable. Consider adjusting line-break tweak for <sm breakpoint.

tested_flows: Landing renders with hero-title, hero-cta-primary->/booking, hero-cta-secondary, client-strip, all 4 service cards (service-book-{slug} for install-opencart-zoom, website-development, mobile-app-development, digital-consulting), how-step-1..4, testimoni-0..2, faq-item-0..3, final-cta
/booking/website-development preselects 'Pembuatan Website' in the Layanan input and summary
Calendar next-month navigation works; sundays/past dates disabled (cal-disabled / cal-other-month)
Selecting a future weekday triggers GET /api/availability and renders 9 enabled slot chips by default
After successful booking, the booked time slot is removed from subsequent availability fetch (verified 09:00 disappeared)
Booking POST creates record; success card shows id (8-char upper) and 'Jumat, 15 Mei 2026 / 09:00 WIB'; success toast 'Booking berhasil' shown
Slot collision via API returns 409 with detail 'Slot ini sudah dibooking' (matches frontend toast wiring)
Admin login: wrong password shows 'Email atau password salah' inline (data-testid='admin-login-error')
Admin login with admin@inscaledigital.id / AdminInscale#2026 redirects to /admin

Dashboard shows stats (total/today/pending/confirmed/revenue Rp), filter chips (filter-all/pending/confirmed/completed/cancelled), search input (admin-search), and table rows with action buttons (confirm/complete/pending/cancel/delete)
Status update: 'confirm-{id}' patch endpoint refreshes stats (Pending 3->2, Dikonfirmasi 0->1, Pendapatan 0->4.500.000)
Search 'TEST' filters table to 1 matching row
Logout (admin-logout) clears cookie and revisiting /admin redirects to /admin/login
Responsive: no horizontal scroll at 390px (mobile), 768px (tablet), 1440px (desktop) on landing & booking
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ bookings during e2e: 'TEST User <ts>' (15 Mei 2026 09:00, website-development, confirmed), 'TEST C1' (10 Jun 2026 14:00, digital-consulting). Existing seeds Rina Wijaya and Andi Pratama present. Admin can clean these via delete action.
console_warnings: WebSocket dev-server hot-reload tries ws://localhost:443/ws and fails (WDS_SOCKET_PORT=443 in /app/frontend/.env). Non-blocking for product but noisy in console; consider unsetting WDS_SOCKET_PORT for local preview or aligning with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL host.
GET /api/auth/me returns 401 on public pages because AuthContext probes the session — expected; not user-visible.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero3D Three.js Canvas loads a heavy WebGL scene on the public landing page; consider lazy-loading or fallback for low-power devices (currently ~1.5s extra TTI, GPU stall warnings observed in headless Chromium).
Booking.jsx: useEffect dep list disables eslint-react-hooks rule with // eslint-disable-line; activeSlug should be included via lazy initial state to be safe — minor.
WDS_SOCKET_PORT=443 in /app/frontend/.env causes constant ws connection-refused noise; not breaking but should be removed for non-Emergent local runs.

Slot-collision toast path is correctly wired (formatApiErrorDetail + toast variant=destructive) but practically unreachable from UI because availability filters out booked slots. This is fine, but a race condition (two tabs) would surface it — covered by backend 409.

All required data-testid attributes verified in source and at runtime (hero-cta-primary, nav-cta-book, service-book-{slug}, select-service-{slug}, calendar-prev/next, booking-submit-button, booking-success, admin-login-submit/error, admin-logout, admin-stats, filter-{status}, booking-row-{id}, confirm/complete/pending/cancel/delete-{id}).
action_items: (Optional, low priority) Tune mobile hero line-break in Landing.jsx so the em-dash doesn't dangle on its own line at <sm breakpoint.
(Optional, low priority) Consider removing WDS_SOCKET_PORT=443 from /app/frontend/.env for cleaner console.
(Optional) Lazy-mount Hero3D <Suspense> with a static poster fallback to improve mobile FCP.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test seeded admin user works: admin@inscaledigital.id / AdminInscale#2026. Cookie-based auth via AuthContext; /api/auth/me 401s for public pages (expected). When testing slot-collision via UI you cannot reproduce it because availability hides booked slots — use direct API POST against http://localhost:8001/api/bookings to verify 409 path. Booking page route /booking/:slug preselects service. All data-testids confirmed present.
